summary: Go-based test orchestration framework with agent-driven validation, schema checking, and MCP handler support for automated test suite management
patterns: agent-based orchestration with numbered test suites
internal package encapsulation (runner, schema, reporter, mcp)
concerns: large number of agent directories (0005-0037+) suggests heavy test proliferation without clear organization
truncated directory names in agent folders indicate filesystem or naming constraints
test files appear to outnumber source files significantly
metadata commits interleaved with test commits suggest automated agent workflow generating noise
suggestions: consolidate agent test directories into a structured test matrix rather than flat numbered folders
document the agent orchestration workflow and numbering scheme
review test-to-code ratio for coverage efficiency
consider grouping related agent tests by feature area instead of sequential numbering
